feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: projects I want to do
entry.content:
Projects I want to do, one day

Heightmap ↔ Normal map converter

The math seems fun and would allow me to relearn things about PDE (with distributions and so on, not the easy way)

losing my mind pic.twitter.com/K3zYxtP4ko

— Freya Holmér (@FreyaHolmer) January 30, 2024

A good Raytracer

I already have https://github.com/philae-ael/Raytracing but it’s not that good

I want to do a lot of volumetric stuff and also things like fire

A voxel Renderer

Seems fun also, the techniques seems to lie between online rendering and offline rendering

Some geometric stuff

Don’t know what though
entry.summary: Projects I want to do, one day
